files.name: github-claude-attribution
files.description: Append the robot footer to substantive GitHub bodies (issues, PRs, narrative comments). Same footer the gh pr create harness injects.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-content-via-file
files.description: Use --body-file / -F for non-trivial gh or git content; never heredoc/inline (shell quoting on backticks/multiline is the failure mode).
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-metanorma-project
files.description: Issues created in any metanorma/* repo must be added to the org-level Metanorma project
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-narrative-location
files.description: Narrative goes in ticket comments for gems you maintain, in PR descriptions otherwise. Mechanism universal; data in companion file.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-no-releases
files.description: Don't bump gem VERSION, run gem build/push, or rake release; metanorma gems ship as part of a fortnightly batched release cadence.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-pr-assignment
files.description: Every PR must have an assignee at creation time. Pass --assignee to gh pr create; consult user-maintained-gems.md for who.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: github-pr-title-issue-link
files.description: Embed the full issue URL in the PR title so GitHub renders the cross-reference card with the PR title visible on the issue timeline.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: memory-autoload-default
files.description: When user says "remember", save to ~/.claude/memory/ + inline operational rule into ~/.claude/instructions/ file @-included from CLAUDE.md.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: narrate-plan
files.description: Before each non-trivial tool call, state intent in one sentence; name the rejected alternative at decision points.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: paragraph-shape
files.description: Soft max 4 sentences per paragraph when reasoning is surfaced in narrow side-panel narration; not a cap for maximised docs.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: sibling-clones
files.description: Clone external repos into the parent of cwd (sibling directories), never /tmp; persistence across sessions is the goal.
files.author: opoudjis

files.name: user-maintained-gems
files.description: Maintainer table for github-narrative-location + github-pr-assignment. Replace placeholders; Nick's metanorma row is the worked example.
files.author: opoudjis
